_doc: Registry for ship-gate.py (RETRO-0708-SHIP-GATE; retro findings 4 + gap-model). Each entry is a PRODUCT's user-reachable artifact — the thing that must serve for the product to be SHIPPED rather than code-complete. A product whose artifact goes dark (curl 000/5xx, or the rail stripped from the served artifact) fails the gate: a merged PR, a receipt, or a filed lever never satisfies it (PREC-2026-07-08-armed-valve-outcome). Add a product = add one entry when its first artifact goes live.

surfaces.what: MONETA buyer-facing storefront — the checkout users land on (retro finding 4: deployed URL returned nothing while the organ read code-complete)
MONETA licence pubkey — offline verification depends on it serving
ChatGPT Exporter public install page (Cloudflare Pages, auto-deploys on master)
the served userscript carries the Buy-Pro mint rail — the user-reachable half of first-dollar (EXCAV-0708-EXPORTER-ARM)
